title: Cursed Relics
description: A combat-magic mod made to enhance the combat mechanic with vanilla-styled effects.
body:
![cursed relics image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/499aec5cd3fd500042794953d4c827faf017f484.png)

**PLEASE BEWARE, MOD IS STILL IN ALPHA STAGE. CHANGES AND BUGS ARE TO BE EXPECTED. THANK YOU.**

# DEVELOPMENT NOTICE ⚠️
Due to unforseen circumstances, Cursed Relics had hit a roadblock in development.
The next course of action will be a rewrite for the 1.21.4 with old items and brand new items.

## About Mod
Engage in combat with new mechanics and abilities!</br>
Cursed Relics is a mod that's focused in enhancing the combat mechanic. Over 30+ brand new combat-enhancing items each with their own ability. Some abilities are inspired by the anime series: 'A Certain Magical Index'.

## Features
- **Balanced Gameplay** - The existence of an all-powerful relic may disturb the balance of the gameplay, therefore the concept of 'sacrifice' is implemented. A great sacrifice may be required to use a high-tiered relic.
- **Vanilla Experience** - All vanilla-styled effects.
- **Multiplayer** - The mod was created with multiplayers in mind, considering all aspect of a balanced pvp.

## Mechanics
- **Relics** - Each relic has their own ability, from power enhancing, buffs, and healing.
- **Levels** - The out of the box ability may come as unfulfilling after some time, levels to each item will elevate each ability from the relic, adding further depth into the combat experience.
- **Tiered** - Not all ability may come as the all-powerful one, each obtained relic is tiered into one of the 4 tiers.
